commit.hardwareTrackingDesc: To ensure fairness, manual entries will not be accepted and counted. Only activities and steps registered by a hardware device will count.
commit.noticeManual: Manual entries in Apple Health or Google Health Connect will not be accepted or counted.
commit.noticeHardware: Only activities and steps registered by hardware like a watch, a smartband, or your mobile device itself will be accepted and counted.
commit.acceptConsentLabel: I accept that manual entries will not count and only hardware-registered data is accepted.
commit.payFingerprint: Place finger on sensor to confirm
commit.statement_weekly_steps: I commit to walk more than total {{value}} steps in the {{period}}.

commit.statement_weekly_cycle: I commit to cycle more than total {{value}} km in the {{period}}.
commit.statement_weekly_calories: I commit to burn more than total {{value}} active kcal in the {{period}}.
commit.statement_weekly_activeTime: I commit to exercise for more than total {{value}} mins in the {{period}}.
commit.statement_weekly_default: I commit to achieve more than total {{value}} in the {{period}}.
commit.statement_daily_steps: I commit to walk more than {{value}} steps everyday for a {{period}}.
commit.statement_daily_run: I commit to run more than {{value}} km everyday for a {{period}}.
commit.statement_daily_mindfulness: I commit to practice mindfulness for more than {{value}} mins everyday for a {{period}}.

commit.statement_daily_calories: I commit to burn more than {{value}} active kcal everyday for a {{period}}.

history.noHistoryDesc: Your resolved commitments will appear here.

history.bannerWeeklyFailure: Target missed by {{diff}} {{unit}}. Stake of €{{stake}} forfeited.

resolution.weeklyFailureDesc: You only achieved a total of {{achieved}} {{unit}} (Goal: {{target}}). According to the loss aversion agreement, your pledge funds are forfeited.
resolution.dailyFailureDesc: You missed your daily target on at least one day. According to the loss aversion agreement, your pledge funds are forfeited.

modals.syncIssueDesc: Some permissions are restricted. Please enable them in your Apple Health settings.
modals.sandboxDesc: Health sensor connection loaded in sandbox simulation mode.
modals.physicalSensorNotice: Verification utilizes physical sensor data only. Manually typed-in steps or workout entries are automatically filtered and not counted.
modals.verificationIntro: HabitContract is designed to help you build real, honest discipline. Here is how we verify your commitments officially and fairly:
modals.step1Desc: HabitContract syncs with {{source}} directly on your device. We request read-only access to count specific activity totals (like steps, run/cycling distance, active minutes, and mindfulness).
modals.step2Desc: To ensure honesty and accountability, we only count fitness data recorded by physical sensors. This includes any smartwatch that can write to Apple Health or Google Health Connect, fitness smartbands, or your mobile device's built-in motion sensors.
modals.step3Desc: Any workout details or step counts typed in or added to your health apps manually by hand are automatically detected and filtered out. Only physical sensor recordings are counted.
modals.step4Desc: Health sensors store statistics locally on your phone. To make sure all weekly values (including the final day) are uploaded, you have a 48-hour grace period after the commitment period ends (until Tuesday at 23:59) to open the app and sync.
modals.step5Desc: If you sync within the 48-hour grace period and meet your target, your stake is fully returned. If you fail to meet the target, or if you do not open the app to sync before the 48 hours expire, your stake is forfeited.
